# PERF-95 positive: many app.Use calls in a Fiber app
lang: go
file: PERF-095-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func Build(app *fiber.App) {
	app.Use(loggerMW)
	app.Use(recoverMW)
	app.Use(corsMW)
	app.Use(authMW)
	app.Get("/foo", fooHandler)
}

func loggerMW(c *fiber.Ctx) error  { return c.Next() }
func recoverMW(c *fiber.Ctx) error { return c.Next() }
func corsMW(c *fiber.Ctx) error    { return c.Next() }
func authMW(c *fiber.Ctx) error    { return c.Next() }
func fooHandler(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	return c.SendString("foo")
}
